overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic game showing a character with a rifle and backpack walking through a foggy, dark shoreline toward a large beached shipwreck. The character climbs onto the vessel and explores the deck with a flashlight, examining the rusted cabin structure in the misty, blue-tinted environment.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dense fog toward the beached ship with rifle slung on back

entered.detail: large shipwreck beached on shore, visible as dark silhouette through fog
tilted wooden utility pole with crossbar leaning against the sky
large boulders and debris scattered on sandy beach
ruined building silhouettes barely visible in fog background

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a desolate foggy shoreline toward a massive beached shipwreck. The environment is dark and misty with poor visibility, scattered rocks on the sand, and tilted utility poles marking the approach to the vessel.

scene_state.functional_zone: deck of beached ship with cabin structure

events.description: character jumps from sandy shore onto the ship deck
character shines flashlight on ship cabin walls while examining the rusted structure

agents.ego_description: climbing onto the ship deck and cautiously exploring the vessel with flashlight beam scanning the cabin

entered.detail: white and yellow ship cabin with rust stains, windows, and upper observation deck
metal deck surface of the beached ship with weathered textures
orange life preserver ring lying on the deck
metal safety railing along the edge of the ship deck

segments.scene_description: The character climbs onto the ship deck and explores the vessel's interior structure. The flashlight illuminates the rusted cabin walls, metal railings, and an orange life preserver on deck while the character moves cautiously around the confined space of the shipwreck.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, foggy shoreline into the rusted interior of a massive beached shipwreck. It begins with the character navigating a dark and misty beach, moving past scattered rocks and tilted utility poles that mark the approach to the vessel. As the character reaches the ship, the scene shifts from the open, low-visibility coast to the confined spaces of the deck. The camera then follows the character as they climb aboard, where a flashlight cuts through the gloom to illuminate rusted cabin walls, metal railings, and an orange life preserver. The movement finally settles into a cautious exploration of the vessel's interior structure amidst the oppressive blue-tinted mist.
